title: carex muricata subsp. divulsa
intro: Carex muricata subsp. divulsa, also known as the coastal sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Consuming Carex muricata subsp. divulsa has been linked to various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal remedy.
